title: mentha × dumetorum var. braunii
intro: Mentha × dumetorum var. braunii, also known as Braun's wild mint, is a variety of the Mentha × dumetorum species, a hybrid of peppermint and watermint. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory agent. The health benefits of Braun's wild mint include relief from digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Braun's wild mint can be consumed in various herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water.
